name: Donetick
description: An intelligent way to organize tasks and chores
compose:
name: slashnode-donetick
services:
  app:
    image: donetick/donetick:v0.1.75
    container_name: donetick
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DT_ENV: selfhosted
      DT_SQLITE_PATH: /donetick-data/donetick.db
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/donetick-data
      - app_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8121:2021
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-donetick_app_data-app
  app_data-config:
    name: slashnode-donetick_app_data-config
